Featured_Projects

Habit Tracker

A comprehensive diary and habit tracking application featuring daily journaling, yearly habit visualization, streak tracking, and mood analytics. Built with React and Firebase for real-time synchronization across devices.

React Firebase Vite
Features:
  • • Daily habit tracking with streaks
  • • Yearly visualization & analytics
  • • Mood tracking & journaling
  • • Cloud sync across devices
LIVE SITE

Factory Manager

Enterprise-grade management system for manufacturing operations. Comprehensive solution for inventory control, order processing, customer relationship management, and employee administration. Reduced manual workload by 50%.

Python React Firebase Cloud
Modules:
  • • Real-time stock management
  • • Order tracking & fulfillment
  • • Customer database & CRM
  • • Employee management portal
LIVE SITE

Junwa Sustain

Full-stack development of corporate website and integrated event management system for junwasustain.site. Dual-purpose platform serving both as company presentation and event coordination tool with real-time updates.

React Node.js Firebase Tailwind
Capabilities:
